video_info.title: Talent TV Cup
video_info.shortDescription: India A take on Afghanistan A in their next Talent TV Cup clash in Sri Lanka. With India determined to bounce back from their earlier defeat and Afghanistan equally focused on securing a crucial win, this contest could play a decisive role in shaping the path to the finals. Find out as we bring you all the action from this India A vs Afghanistan A fixture, LIVE on Sony LIV.
